name: Chocolate Raspberry Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cookie crumbs and melted margarine; press onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. In a large bowl, combine the softened cream cheese and sugar. Mix until well blended.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Blend in the sour cream and vanilla extract.
5. Pour the batter over the crust.
6. In another bowl, combine the remaining cream cheese, melted chocolate chips, and raspberry preserves. Mix until well blended.
7. Drop rounded spoonfuls of the chocolate cream cheese mixture over the plain cream cheese layer.
8. Bake at 325 degrees F for 1 hour and 25 minutes, or until set.
9. Cool completely before removing from the pan.
10. Melt the remaining chocolate chips and whipping cream together over low heat, stirring until smooth.
11. Spread the melted chocolate mixture over the cheesecake.
12. Chill before serving.
13. Garnish with additional whipped cream, raspberries, and fresh mint leaves if desired.
